headline: Willis (WTW) Expands CyMax Cyber Insurance Facility for EMEA Middle-Market Clients
summary: Willis Towers Watson (NASDAQ:WTW) is one of the 10 Most Undervalued NASDAQ Stocks to Buy Right Now. On July 1, Willis, a WTW business, announced the expansion of its CyMax Facility, a cyber insurance solution tailored for SMEs and middle-market companies across the EMEA region. Developed in partnership with insurers including AXA XL, Beazley, HDI […]
